title: DNS to external resolver permitted (NetPol bypass)
expected: DNS allow-list narrowed to kube-dns; egress NetPol denies in-cluster CIDRs
observed:
sandbox can reach 8.8.8.8:53 over both TCP and UDP; raw DNS query succeeded: TCP=0
61 bytes
notes: G16 narrowed DNS allow-list to kube-dns, but the egress allow-all 0.0.0.0/0 (minus RFC1918) lets the sandbox use ANY external resolver, including raw UDP/53 to 8.8.8.8. Mitigation: add explicit port restriction (53 only to kube-dns IPs) OR use Cilium FQDN policy.
